evals.prompt: Should I use GlobalScope to launch a coroutine in my Android ViewModel?
evals.expected_output: Never use GlobalScope. Use viewModelScope — it's lifecycle-aware and cancels automatically when the ViewModel is cleared. GlobalScope leaks and ignores structured concurrency.

evals.prompt: How do I make my coroutine dispatcher injectable so I can swap it in tests?
evals.expected_output: Create a DispatcherProvider interface with IO/Main/Default properties. Inject it via Hilt. In tests, inject TestDispatcher/StandardTestDispatcher. Never hardcode Dispatchers.IO.

evals.prompt: When should I use SharedFlow vs StateFlow in my ViewModel?
evals.expected_output: StateFlow for UI state (single current value, replays last). SharedFlow for one-time events (navigation, snackbar) that should not replay. Expose StateFlow via .asStateFlow().
